title: Display Campfires
description:
Adds the ability to display every block/item on a campfire.
*unlit campfire items stay forever
*lit campfire items pop off after 1 billion ticks
body:
Campfire displays is a datapack that allows for all blocks/items to be placed on campfires, while retaining the normal campfire cooking recipes.
*lit campfires will have their blocks/items pop off after 1 Billion Ticks.
*unlit campfires will retain their items until broken.
